# launchdarkly_experiment (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly experiment data source.

This data source allows you to retrieve information about an experiment in an environment.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_experiment" "checkout_button" {
  project_key     = "example-project"
  environment_key = "production"
  key             = "checkout-button-experiment"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_key` (String) The environment key.
- `key` (String) The unique key that references the experiment.
- `project_key` (String) The project key.

### Read-Only

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the experiment is archived.
- `description` (String) A description of the experiment.
- `holdout_id` (String) The ID of the holdout associated with this experiment.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource, in the format `project_key/environment_key/experiment_key`.
- `maintainer_id` (String) The ID of the member who maintains the experiment.
- `name` (String) The human-friendly name of the experiment.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with the experiment.
